creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
Umm... I think the upstream code has a few issues and needs more work. The ones I noticed:

- UB at https://git.qorg11.net/fingerd.git/tree/fingerd.c#n224, an off-by-one error

- UB at https://git.qorg11.net/fingerd.git/tree/fingerd.c#n225 if there if no \r in the received username, because read_from_sock() doesn't NULL-terminate

- UB at https://git.qorg11.net/fingerd.git/tree/fingerd.c#n226 if there if no \n in the received username, because read_from_sock() doesn't NULL-terminate

- same in logger() a few lines down, at https://git.qorg11.net/fingerd.git/tree/fingerd.c#n93

Also, there's already fingerd in base, do we need another in ports?
